description: The finding already cites the prior frontier: 'The previous systematic frontier in the peer-reviewed literature appears to be around n <= 25: Bürgisser and Ikenmeyer (2008)' and notes 'A zbMATH and arXiv search (April 2026) found no published complete table for n > 25'. References include Bürgisser & Ikenmeyer (2008), Ikenmeyer, Mulmuley & Walter (2017), and Pak & Panova (2017). Resolved in commit 95db7f2.
action_taken: The finding already cites the prior frontier: 'The previous systematic frontier in the peer-reviewed literature appears to be around n <= 25: Bürgisser and Ikenmeyer (2008)' and notes 'A zbMATH and arXiv search (April 2026) found no published complete table for n > 25'. References include Bürgisser & Ikenmeyer (2008), Ikenmeyer, Mulmuley & Walter (2017), and Pak & Panova (2017). Resolved in commit 95db7f2.
